description: Date the fight occurred in YYYY-MM-DD or parseable date format.
One fighter in the bout; order can be either orientation.
The other fighter in the bout; order can be either orientation.
UFC weight class such as Lightweight or Women's Strawweight.
Event location text such as Las Vegas Nevada USA.
1 if this fight was the main event else 0.
1 if this fight was a title fight else 0.
